name: BTC + ETH Trial-00095 Portfolio Diagnostic
edge_rationale: BTC trial-00095 is high quality but frequency constrained, while the audited ETH transfer produced materially higher trade count with positive expectancy. Before runtime architecture work, the combined BTC+ETH artifact must show acceptable portfolio interaction: low enough daily PnL correlation, low same-bar overlap, controlled concentration, and strong combined R metrics.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: The same sweep/reclaim liquidity response may exist across large-cap crypto perpetuals. Portfolio value comes from applying one validated mechanism to separate instruments, not from adding a new setup family.
required_data: Frozen BTC trial-00095 full replay trade artifact
Audited ETH trial-00095 transfer replay trades
frozen_assumptions: No production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, core, execution, orchestrator, or settings changes.
No parameter optimization and no ETH retuning.
Use frozen BTC trial-00095 full replay artifact.
Use audited ETH transfer replay generated from frozen trial-00095 parameters.
Correlation uses daily pnl_r buckets based on trade open timestamps.
Same-bar overlap is a signal timing proxy, not full exposure overlap.
This milestone can recommend architecture design, not runtime deployment.
expected_observation: If BTC+ETH is a viable portfolio direction, the combined allow-both artifact should maintain ER >= 1.5, PF >= 2.0, controlled R drawdown, daily PnL correlation <= 0.70, same-bar overlap <= 10%, and no single month concentration above 20%.

kill_criteria.unfrozen_inputs: Changing BTC or ETH entry logic invalidates the diagnostic.
kill_criteria.high_correlation: Daily PnL correlation above 0.70 blocks architecture work without explicit risk redesign.
kill_criteria.high_same_bar_overlap: Same-bar overlap above 10% requires conflict policy design before proceeding.
kill_criteria.deployment_claim: Any PAPER/LIVE approval claim invalidates the report.

failure_modes: ETH and BTC profits are highly correlated, making frequency look better while portfolio drawdown risk is concentrated.
Same-bar signals cluster around market-wide crypto shocks and require portfolio-level exposure caps.
BTC artifact lacks close timestamps, so exposure overlap is under-specified.
Combined result is dominated by one month or quarter.
author: Codex
